'''''Swift''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] in service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was this ship that took [[Ysanne Isard]] and her team of commandos to the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] in her attempt to recapture the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''. The ship was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Wintle]].<ref name="Isard's Revenge" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Swift appeared in the [[1999]] novel, [[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]], written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]].<ref name="Isard's Revenge" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
